scripts.lint:repo-architecture: npm run lint:doc-canonical && npm run lint:task-artifacts && npm run lint:module-metadata && npm run lint:repo-catalog && npm run lint:architecture-fitness && npm run lint:api-docs && npm run lint:adr-lifecycle
scripts.check:repo-architecture: npm run test:repo-architecture && npm run lint:repo-architecture && npm run lint:contracts && npm run lint:repo-artifacts && npm run lint:deploy && npm run test:deploy
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.test:repo-architecture: node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-1-red-tests/repo-architecture-contract.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-2-contracts/contract-docs.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-2-contracts/phase-0-1-regression.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-3-metadata-catalog/metadata-catalog.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-4-module-manifests/module-manifests.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-5-generated-indexes/generated-indexes.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-6-enforcement/enforcement-lints.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-7-doc-canonicalization/doc-canonicalization.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-8-architecture-fitness/architecture-fitness.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-9-route-api-docs/route-api-docs.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-10-adr-lifecycle/adr-lifecycle.test.mjs; node --test scripts/tasks/repo-architecture-contract/phases/phase-11-final-acceptance/final-acceptance.test.mjs
scripts.test:hades-gif-media-reliability: npm --prefix backend run test:hades-media-verification && npm --prefix frontend run test:hades-chat-media-ui
scripts.test:hades-instagram-social: npm --prefix backend run test:hades-instagram-social && npm --prefix frontend run test:hades-instagram-social-ui
scripts.test:hades-inline-gif-media: npm --prefix backend run test:hades-inline-gif-media && npm --prefix frontend run test:hades-inline-gif-media-ui
scripts.test:discord-login-bot-contracts: npm run test:auth-discord-connection-contract && npm run test:hades-discord-bot-runtime-contract
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint:contracts && npm run lint:repo-artifacts && npm run lint:deploy && npm run lint:architecture && npm test && npm run test:deploy && npm run test:evals
scripts.verify:portable: npm run lint:deploy && npm run lint:architecture && npm test && npm run test:portable && npm --prefix frontend run build
